x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Active Risk Intelligence scores provide the AI-generated vendor risk signals that Now Assist uses to prioritize assessments and surface high-risk third parties. Without active scoring, AI-powered risk prioritization and early warning capabilities are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure a risk intelligence provider to feed external risk scores into TPRM.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Active Risk Intelligence scores provide the AI-generated vendor risk signals that Now Assist uses to prioritize assessments and surface high-risk third parties. Without active scoring, AI-powered risk prioritization and early warning capabilities are unavailable.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Risk Intelligence Scores Active</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_security_score");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" scores",finding:c+" risk intelligence scores found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" scores",finding:c+" scores found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 scores",finding:"No risk intelligence scores found. Consider integrating a risk intelligence provider."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>TPRM</module>
<number>CHK0006203</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Configure a risk intelligence provider to feed external risk scores into TPRM.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb0</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
